transcript.text:
[What's all this noise?]
[What she will be having today...]
[Is not for humans]
[Spicy Jjamppong (seafood noodles)]
[All spicy-lovers are eager to try]
[Other dishes to help with the spice]
[A new world for Tzuyang]
Will you be alright?
I heard people faint
[Whatever, let's just eat!]
What is this!
Wow, it's coming
[Her soul has left the body]
[I'm tearing up...]
[The spiciest noodles]
You can give up

[A battle with spiciness]
[Will she be able to finish it?]
Hello everyone
I'm here at Sillim-dong today
I was told there is a very famous restaurant here with the spiciest jjamppong (seafood noodles)
I've been craving some spicy food because of stress
The spicy levels are from 0.5 to 9 How spicy can it be?
[Jjamppong Gap] [Gwanak-gu, Sillim-dong]
Hello~!
[Let's scan the menu first]
The spice levels are there
From 0.5 to 9
And 9 says "Transcend the human realm"
Even 7 says "Out-of-body mental breakdown"
That's terrifying
How spicy is level 9?

Excuse me
How spicy is level 9?
Hella spicy
Really
Level 2 is a little spicier than Fire Chicken Noodles
Level 2 is spicier than Fire Chicken Noodles?!
I do be craving spicy food at times
And I want something really spicy right now
I should try level 9 since I'm here, no?
I like to challenge myself
Excuse me
Can I make an order?
Can I have everything on the menu?
Pork Belly Jjamppong and Gap Jjamppong Rice at level 0.5
Gap Jjamppong at level 9
[Are you going to be okay?]

I'll be fine
Gap Jjajang (black bean noodles) at 0.5
1 whole order of Glutinous Fried Dumplings
Gap Jjajang Rice at 0.5
1 Cool Peace (peach drink)
-Is this all for yourself? -Yes
[Spiciness that's out of this world]
[First, we have the pork belly jjamppong at 0.5]
[Let's get spicy]
[Not for humans, this is a new world]
[This is level 9]
[Gap Jjajang (black bean) Rice]
[Gap Jjajang Noodles]
[Now for the side dishes]
[Tangsuyuk (fried pork with sweet & sour sauce)]
[Order up]

Thank you
Here's the level 9
The smell is fine
I'll mix this up first
Let's take the peas out
Get outta here!
It mixes so much better if you dine in
I need to prepare my stomach with this first
This is a very standard and delicious jjajangmyun
It has some sweetness, but not too sweet
I ordered the rest at a low spice level except for the level 9
This is thinly-sliced pork belly jjamppong
That's tasty
It's a good level of spice
It tastes so good
The noodles soaked up the flavors really well

The soup is really relieving
Not salty, but has strong flavors
Level 0.5 is not spicy
Just has a kick to it
This has to be one of the best Jjamppong I've had recently
Next,
I have to try that now, right? Will I be okay?
Will you be okay?
Level 9? haha
Can you manage it?
I only eat level 1
Thank you
I need to prepare myself Drink some Cool Peace
Let's try some soup first
The color doesn't seem too bad
It's spicy right away

This is no joke
It's still okay for me
You didn't make this less spicy for me, right?
No, it's how we serve it
Fighting
The spiciness spreads quickly as soon as you take a bite It's still fine
[There's no way]
[Her eyes are out of focus]
I'm good at eating spicy food
[Your expressions say otherwise]
It's here It's coming!
[Mental breakdown]
Guys...
It's spicy
I need to cool it down
[With some Tangsuyuk]

This tastes so good!
[Don't cry, stupid]
The spiciness comes in phases
Goes up just like a rollercoaster
And it hits you
We had a customer faint once They were on the floor for about an hour
I'm fine,
[Just crying]
Some jjajangmyun for stomach protection
Yupdduk and Fire Chicken Noodles are all incomparable
It's on par with the Crazy Dumplings
[Crazy Dumplings]
[Crazy Dumplings that made Tzuyang cry]
That was really crazy
I'm not good with chili peppers And it was really really spicy
But I think this is #1

[Remember, this is all for stomach protection]
Let's eat the original one
-Am I not doing a good job so far? -Yes, that's good
People even struggle at levels 2 and 3 So even trying 9 is huge
Yay
I'm good with spicy food!
I think I've gotten better at it from eating spicy food often
Pop the yolk
Everything tastes really good here
Just what I like
This is it
Delicious
[You know the food is good when she doesn't say much]
Some Jjamppong too This tastes so good
[Noodle vacuum cleaner]
Now for some Tangsuyuk

So tender and tasty
There are citron bits in the sauce
Love the taste of it
[Now for some more silence]
[How is that possible?]
Level 9 is the end-game boss So I'll eat it last
How different is the soup?
The base is similar
This is good too
This one has a seafood-based soup
This one's meat
Jjajang Rice, last bite!
The sauce is so good that I scraped up everything
The onions are cut into tiny pieces, so it's perfect for someone that can't eat vegetables like me
I've been eating spicy food really well lately
So I'm good at it now

[Yeah, whatever...]
The Crazy Dumplings were #1,
But this surpasses it by 2~3 levels
This is just insane
It's the spiciest food I've ever had
I came to eat spicy food to relieve stress
But the flavors did the job instead
The texture is amazing
Soup is so good too I'm drinking everything
So good
The soup is full of flavor just like a broth
Excellent
The best
You're so good at eating You eat so much
I'm in awe every time How can you eat all of that?
Have you tried Level 9?

-I can't eat spicy foods -Really?
I heard people faint
I haven't fainted yet
You can do it!
Thank you
Jjammpong rice
I can see glass noodles inside
Glass noodles make up everything in a Jjamppong Rice
1 bowl of rice is this much
Mix it up
I like the noodles,
And I also like rice too,
It has deep flavors like Yukgaejang broth (spicy beef soup)
It goes so well with rice
So tasty
So good

[Remember, silence=good food]
You're eating a good amount
She said "good amount"
[Sales Queen]
Thinking about this...
I'm scared to eat it
Let's think about it while I eat this
I've never given up a challenge before no matter how spicy it was
One Chip Challenge, Crazy Dumplings, Songju Fire Noodles
-You're so good at eating -Right? haha
I think I should order delivery from here after a night of drinking
Fried dumplings in soy sauce
[Is it my turn now?]
I'm scared!!!
You can give up
[Devil's temptation]

-There are not many people that finished it in the last 5 years -Really?
1 male, 1 female
[Let's continue eating while I think about it]
Delicious
[The Joker...?]
[Wipe wipe]
[Bye]
I'm more stressed now
Just because I had red stains on my face
Should I wash it for you?
No no, it's okay!
It doesn't work like that?
Eating that much is very impressive
We're cheering you on
[Now for the end-game boss]
[All the preparation has been done]

[I will not accept defeat]
Such strong smell from this 1 piece of noodle
1 piece of noodle is this effective?
[It's level 9...]
Guys, I give up!
[You did a great job still]
It's so spicy! PD, please try 1 piece
-1 piece is too little -No, you can't! You're going to die!
It's spicier because it's been sitting here
Don't inhale too fast
Oh, I give up then
I'm nauseous now
How did I eat it earlier?
I've lost
[Ending it here because it's too spicy~!] [Thanks everyone!] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
